refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed into specific sub-functions to address distinct aspects of worksite mapping, enabling focused design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify each sub-FR by demonstrating accurate terrain maps, reliable obstacle detection, and correct work-zone representation through simulation and field tests.
sub_frs: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area
Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite

candidate_dps: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition
Implement a geospatial data processing algorithm for terrain and obstacle modeling
Develop a GIS-based work-zone representation module
selected_dp.selected_dp: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition

coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically addresses the FR with minimal coupling to other DPs; sensor fusion is a well-defined approach that can be modularized.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-quality LIDAR and camera data
Risk of sensor data inconsistency affecting model accuracy
High safety criticality requires robust error handling
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding redundancy in sensor data acquisition to mitigate risks.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level processing and integration of worksite mapping functions

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams from Vehicle sensors

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite map data to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for planning and execution

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Facilitates data exchange with remote Safety Services and Teleoperation modules

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as mapping is core to NGHE Solution; low diffusion risk due to centralized processing.
Vehicle provides raw data but does not process mapping; high diffusion risk if mapping logic placed here.
Teleoperation consumes map data but should not contain mapping logic to avoid duplication.
Safety Services uses map data for alerts but is not responsible for mapping.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports safety-critical integration.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes overloaded
Dependency on reliable Telemetry interface for timely data
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor performance and consider modular subcomponents within NGHE Solution for scalability.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR with clear verification paths and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk due to centralized mapping logic in NGHE Solution
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support assignment to NGHE Solution; interfaces are well-defined and appropriate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed at the NGHE Solution module level with sensor data and map output validation.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping function to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces to Vehicle and Teleoperation.

recommended_revisions: Add redundancy in sensor data acquisition to mitigate risks
Plan for performance monitoring of NGHE Solution module

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements and safety criticality constraints with clear verification and manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area
Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: High-quality sensor data is available and reliable
Interfaces (Telemetry, Tasking, Network Link) function as specified
open_risks: Sensor data inconsistency impacting map accuracy
Performance bottlenecks in NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Field test data validating sensor fusion accuracy
Performance metrics of NGHE Solution under load
